description: Crafted from 92% cotton and 8% spandex fabric, this medium coverage cut and sew brassiere from enamor is designed with embroidery on the cups and a cut that offers exemplary comfort making it perfect for the confident you. Ideal for support through the day. Made of breathable stretch cotton/spandex fabric for enhanced comfort Cut and sew construction - seamed cups to offer perfect Fit and firm support with embroidery on the cups Beautifully cushioned straps with perfect stretch Printed label for abrasion-free comfort Wash care Hand wash below 40 degrees Do not bleach or iron Drip dry in shade Owing to intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
